text: Entering this space, I am struck by the juxtaposition of transparency and enclosure. The glass partition suggests openness, yet it also demarcates a threshold — an invitation and a boundary both. The colors and words of the exhibit beyond beckon with a promise of innovation and discovery, especially with the prominent 'R+D' signifying creation and forward movement. It is both exhilarating and unsettling, as if I am poised between the safety of the known and the unpredictability of the new. Here, I find myself curious, reflective, and a little disoriented, eager to engage with ideas that transcend the confines of these walls.
